verify_patient_ok: Front desk: Yes, Eleanor Martinez is on file with Medicare Part B. Date of birth confirmed.
verify_patient_partial: Front desk: I see a Martinez on file but need to confirm DOB before releasing details.
verify_order_ok: Front desk: The order is for a standard manual wheelchair, billing code K0001, medically necessary per visit notes.
verify_order_partial: Front desk: The chart mentions wheelchair but billing code is not confirmed yet.
schedule_followup_ok: Front desk: Please call back Thursday to check whether Dr. Chen has signed the order.
in_queue: Front desk: The written order is still in the MA queue waiting for Dr. Chen to review. Verbal order noted in chart.
ma_reviewing: Front desk: The medical assistant confirmed the request reached Dr. Chen. Doctor is reviewing today.
no_answer: Advocate: Hello? [Phone rang 4 times — no answer, left voicemail.]
signed: Front desk: Dr. Chen signed the K0001 manual wheelchair order today and submitted it to the DME supplier.
rejected_wrong_code: Front desk: Doctor signed order with billing code K0002 power wheelchair — wrong code for this request.
